mapper.select:
SELECT e.event_seq ,e.title ,e.description AS summary ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location ,e.status ,CASE WHEN e.deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS use_yn ,e.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,e.event_type ,o.name AS organization_name ,e.max_participants ,COALESCE(rc.registration_count, 0) AS registration_count FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq LEFT JOIN ( SELECT event_seq, COUNT(*) AS registration_count FROM event.event_participants WHERE status = 'registered' GROUP BY event_seq ) rc ON rc.event_seq = e.event_seq
e.deleted_at IS NULL
AND e.status = ANY(string_to_array(#{status}, ','))
AND e.event_type = #{eventType}
AND e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq}
AND ( e.title ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR o.name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY e.start_at DESC, e.event_seq DESC

SELECT e.event_seq ,e.title ,e.description ,e.description AS content ,e.description AS summary ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.registration_start_at AS registration_start_dt ,e.registration_end_at AS registration_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location ,e.registration_type ,e.registration_url ,e.status ,e.rejection_reason ,CASE WHEN e.deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS use_yn ,e.file_seq ,e.attachment_file_seq ,e.event_type ,e.organization_seq ,o.name AS organization_name ,e.max_participants ,e.is_paid ,e.created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,e.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,e.updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,e.updated_at AS upt_date_time FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq WHERE e.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(owner_user.email, ''), NULLIF(o.contact_email, '')) AS recipient_email ,COALESCE(NULLIF(owner_user.name, ''), o.name) AS recipient_name ,o.name AS organization_name FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT u.email ,u.name FROM event.organization_members om INNER JOIN event.users u ON u.user_seq = om.user_seq AND u.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE om.organization_seq = e.organization_seq ORDER BY CASE WHEN om.role = 'owner' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ,CASE WHEN u.status = 'active' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ,om.created_at ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1 ) owner_user ON TRUE WHERE e.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT ep.event_pricing_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.price_type ,ep.price_name ,ep.currency_code ,ep.amount ,ep.sales_start_at ,ep.sales_end_at ,ep.use_yn ,ep.sort_seq ,COALESCE(payment_usage.sold_count, 0) AS sold_count ,COALESCE(payment_usage.payment_count, 0) AS payment_count FROM event.event_pricing ep LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS sold_count ,COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ep.sort_seq ASC, ep.event_pricing_seq ASC

SELECT dc.discount_code_seq ,dc.event_seq ,dc.discount_code ,dc.discount_type ,dc.discount_value ,dc.currency_code ,dc.applies_to_price_type ,dc.usage_limit ,COALESCE(payment_usage.used_count, 0) AS used_count ,COALESCE(payment_usage.payment_count, 0) AS payment_count ,dc.valid_from_at ,dc.valid_to_at ,dc.use_yn ,dc.sort_seq FROM event.event_discount_codes dc LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS used_count ,COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE dc.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dc.sort_seq ASC, dc.discount_code_seq ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.events ( slug, title, description, event_type, is_paid, start_at, end_at, registration_start_at, registration_end_at, venue_name, max_participants, organization_seq, file_seq, attachment_file_seq, registration_type, registration_url, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( 'event-' || substr(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text), 1, 12), #{title}, COALESCE(#{description}, #{content}), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{eventType}, ''), 'main'), COALESCE(#{isPaid}, false), #{eventStartDt}, #{eventEndDt}, #{registrationStartDt}, #{registrationEndDt}, #{location}, #{maxParticipants}, #{organizationSeq}, #{fileSeq}, #{attachmentFileSeq}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{registrationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ''), 'direct'), #{registrationUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{status}, ''), 'draft'), #{rgstUserSeq}, #{uptUserSeq} )
mapper.update: UPDATE event.event_pricing ep SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq )

UPDATE event.event_pricing ep SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ep.event_pricing_seq = #{eventPricingSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq )

UPDATE event.event_discount_codes dc SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dc.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq )

UPDATE event.event_discount_codes dc SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dc.discount_code_seq = #{discountCodeSeq} AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq )
mapper.delete: UPDATE event.events SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_seq = #{eventSeq}
